title: Ability to sort folders alphabetically
excerpt: Is there a way to sort the contents of a folder alphabetically?  I have a bunch of project boards nested in folders and I can’t find a way to organize them.

posts.author: Scott1 (Scott Shields)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to sort the contents of a folder alphabetically? I have a bunch of project boards nested in folders and I can’t find a way to organize them.
